sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt64, bucket Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_hash (id, bucket) VALUES (1, jumpConsistentHash(1, 10));
INSERT INTO test_hash (id, bucket) VALUES (2, jumpConsistentHash(2, 5));
SELECT id, bucket FROM test_hash WHERE bucket = jumpConsistentHash(3, 3);
UPDATE test_hash SET bucket = jumpConsistentHash(id, 7) WHERE id = 1;
